pageTitle: Ei-Oh-DeN Official Site | iOS / Android / Kindle
seoDescription: Ei-Oh-DeN official site. A historical fantasy work by Kohei Elimi Lab, available as an iOS and Android app with a Kindle novel and official LINE stickers.

hero.title: Ei-Oh-DeN
hero.subtitle: A quiet historical fantasy carried by memory, distance, and time.
hero.description: Grow stronger, choose your route, and step into a broad historical fantasy world.
hero.supporting: Now on iOS and Android. A paid app for 200 JPY, with a Kindle novel and official LINE stickers.

screenshots.title: A first look at the mood of the game
screenshots.lead: Battle, base, and worldbuilding each show a different side of Ei-Oh-DeN.

items.title: Battle
items.body: A tense scene where the strength you raised gets tested.

items.title: Base / Inn
items.body: A quieter place to prepare before the next challenge.
items.alt: Inn and base screenshot from Ei-Oh-DeN

items.title: Characters / World
items.body: A glimpse of the world and the atmosphere behind the story.
items.alt: Character and world screenshot from Ei-Oh-DeN

overview.title: The shape of the game at a glance
overview.lead: Ei-Oh-DeN blends historical fantasy with the pleasure of growth, pacing, and finding a steady rhythm in the early game.

stats.label: GENRE
stats.note: A calm Japanese-inspired fantasy atmosphere with strategy-focused growth

stats.label: PLATFORM
stats.note: Released as a paid mobile app

stats.label: PRICE
stats.note: Accessible pricing for a story-rich mobile release

items.title: A historical fantasy world
items.body: Ei-Oh-DeN carries a Japanese-inspired atmosphere with a quieter, more reflective sense of scale.

items.title: Growth and strategy are part of the appeal
items.body: The fun starts early because players can shape their growth route from the beginning. Getting stronger is not separate from the game flow, it is the game flow.

items.title: The world continues through a Kindle novel and LINE stickers
items.body: If the game stays with you, the Kindle novel and official LINE stickers give you more ways to remain inside its world.

quickGuide.title: Beginner strategy
quickGuide.lead: A simple early route that makes the opening stretch easier to settle into.

steps.title: Farm the scarecrow in Stage 01 Phase 01 and retreat
steps.body: In the early game, a stable route is to fight the scarecrow in Stage 01 Phase 01 and retreat while leveling up. It reduces risk and builds a stronger base.

steps.title: Raise Strength to around 30
steps.body: A practical early goal is to raise Strength to around 30 before pushing further. This makes progression more stable.

steps.title: Use dispatch missions
steps.body: Dispatch missions help improve growth efficiency. Running them alongside your normal progression helps the early game feel smoother.

points: A game over means you lose money and EXP
Retreating by phase gives you money and EXP
Allocate your stats on level up
Use that money to buy peach buns
Items do nothing unless you equip them

relatedLead: For players who want to stay a little longer in the world after the game itself.

relatedWorks.title: Kindle novel available
relatedWorks.body: There is a Kindle novel edition for Ei-Oh-DeN. It works as a natural next step for players who want to sink further into the story.
relatedWorks.imageAlt: Cover of the Ei-Oh-DeN Kindle novel

relatedWorks.title: LINE stickers available
relatedWorks.body: Official LINE stickers offer a lighter way to keep a piece of the game close in everyday conversation.

creator.title: Created by Kohei Elimi Lab
creator.body: Ei-Oh-DeN is created by Kohei Elimi Lab. This page keeps the main routes close at hand, from the game itself to related works and contact access.

faqs.question: What is Ei-Oh-DeN?
faqs.answer: Ei-Oh-DeN is a historical fantasy strategy growth mobile work created by Kohei Elimi Lab.

faqs.question: Where can I play Ei-Oh-DeN?
faqs.answer: It is available on both iOS and Android through the App Store and Google Play.

faqs.question: How much does it cost?
faqs.answer: The app is priced at 200 JPY.

faqs.question: What is the beginner strategy route?
faqs.answer: A recommended route is to farm the scarecrow in Stage 01 Phase 01 while retreating, raise Strength to around 30, and use dispatch missions.

faqs.question: Is there a novel or LINE stickers?
faqs.answer: Yes. This page links directly to both the Kindle novel and the official LINE stickers.
